examples: There has been a previous extensive transmural myocardial infarction involving the free wall of the left ventricle.
Except that pneumatosis was only seen in transmural infarction, all the abnormal CT findings were found in different patterns and different degrees of ischemia.
Objective To explore the practicability of real-time myocardial contrast echocardiography (MCE) in assessing the transmural distribution of myocardial perfusion.
